name: Lumbar Spine MRI
description: Lumbar spine MRI for disc and nerve root evaluation

findings.technique: MRI of the lumbar spine with sagittal T1, T2, and axial T2 sequences.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Spinal Canal
sections.content: Spinal canal is [patent / no significant stenosis] at all levels.

sections.name: Disc Levels
sections.content: L1-L2: [normal / no herniation]. L2-L3: [normal / no herniation]. L3-L4: [normal / no herniation]. L4-L5: [normal / no herniation]. L5-S1: [normal / no herniation].

sections.name: Nerve Roots
sections.content: Cauda equina [appears normal / no compression / no mass]. Nerve roots are patent within the lateral recesses.

sections.name: Facet Joints
sections.content: Facet joints [show no hypertrophy / no arthritis].

impression:
1. No significant spinal stenosis.
2. No disc herniation.
3. Normal lumbar spine MRI.
